samples.description: Dentsu is hiring for the role of Associate Business Analyst! Responsibilities of the Candidate : Passionate about analytics, data science, ML, and AI. Curious, detail-oriented, and committed to delivering high-quality work. Comfortable working in fast-paced environments with evolving priorities. A team player with a growth mindset who constantly seeks to learn and improve. Requirements : Bachelor's degree in Engineering (B.Tech) or a similar quantitative/technical field preferred. Experience working with big data platforms (BigQuery, Spark, etc.). Understanding of marketing analytics, attribution, or measurement frameworks. Exposure to cloud environments (GCP/AWS/Azure). Familiarity with machine learning concepts and modeling.

raw_data.title: Associate Business Analyst
raw_data.details:
Dentsu is hiring for the role of Associate Business Analyst!

Responsibilities of the Candidate :

  • Passionate about analytics, data science, ML, and AI.
  • Curious, detail-oriented, and committed to delivering high-quality work.
  • Comfortable working in fast-paced environments with evolving priorities.
  • A team player with a growth mindset who constantly seeks to learn and improve.

Requirements :

  • Bachelor's degree in Engineering (B.Tech) or a similar quantitative/technical field preferred.
  • Experience working with big data platforms (BigQuery, Spark, etc.).
  • Understanding of marketing analytics, attribution, or measurement frameworks.
  • Exposure to cloud environments (GCP/AWS/Azure).
  • Familiarity with machine learning concepts and modeling.

samples.description: Business Importance of the Role: This is a business-critical role that will hone your Sales Leadership style, Team Leadership skills, KOL connect, Product Portfolio Maximization, and P&L mindset, preparing you to grow into larger roles within Genworks. You will have the trust and backing to take complete ownership of revenue and drive circle-level execution of the P&L strategy by working closely with HQ, Field Sales, Service, Product Specialists, Execution, and Support teams. You will be responsible for enhancing the engagement index with your team and customers. The role requires strong attention to detail and operational rigor to manage day-to-day team activities, sales execution, and strategic initiatives aligned with the people plan. You will develop and deploy people strategies in partnership with the GEO CEO, Vertical Heads, and Corporate teams. Key Responsibilities (Daily, Weekly, Monthly, Quarterly, Annual): Achieve quarterly and annual revenue targets in the assigned territory. Build strong relationships with customers, KOLs, and key stakeholders. Identify opportunities, generate leads, and manage a healthy sales funnel. Present product solutions, conduct demonstrations, and drive cross-selling and upselling initiatives. Handle negotiations, pricing discussions, and objection management. Promote the “One Genworks Solutions” approach across the product portfolio. Collaborate with internal teams including Sales, Service, Product, and Support. Ensure compliance with company processes, CRM usage, and documentation standards.

  • You will have the trust and backing to take complete ownership of revenue and drive circle-level execution of the P&L strategy by working closely with HQ, Field Sales, Service, Product Specialists, Execution, and Support teams.
  • You will be responsible for enhancing the engagement index with your team and customers.
  • The role requires strong attention to detail and operational rigor to manage day-to-day team activities, sales execution, and strategic initiatives aligned with the people plan.
  • You will develop and deploy people strategies in partnership with the GEO CEO, Vertical Heads, and Corporate teams.

Key Responsibilities (Daily, Weekly, Monthly, Quarterly, Annual):

  • Identify opportunities, generate leads, and manage a healthy sales funnel.
  • Present product solutions, conduct demonstrations, and drive cross-selling and upselling initiatives.
  • Handle negotiations, pricing discussions, and objection management.
  • Promote the “One Genworks Solutions” approach across the product portfolio.
  • Collaborate with internal teams including Sales, Service, Product, and Support.
  • Ensure compliance with company processes, CRM usage, and documentation standards.

workfunction.name: Sales Support & Operations
workfunction.description: Provides support for sales teams, manages sales operations, and ensures smooth sales processes.
